task_completion.visual_evidence: The Juris-M main application window is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: The Documents directory is accessed to locate the CSL file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager window or a file picker dialog is open, showing the 'Documents' folder or the path '/home/ga/Documents'.

task_completion.description: The custom CSL file is located.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The file 'firm-standard-2025.csl' is visible in the file manager or file picker dialog.

task_completion.description: The installation of the CSL file into Juris-M is initiated.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'firm-standard-2025.csl' file is selected in the Juris-M 'Add Style' file picker, OR a Juris-M dialog box is visible prompting to install the 'Firm Standard 2025' style.

task_completion.description: The Juris-M Style Manager is opened to verify the installation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Juris-M 'Preferences' window is open, with the 'Cite' section and 'Styles' tab active.

task_completion.description: The custom style is successfully installed and available in Juris-M.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The style 'Firm Standard 2025' is clearly listed among the available styles in the Style Manager list within the Juris-M Preferences window.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the genuine Juris-M application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Juris-M interface (with its typical layout, menus, and icons) is visible, not a mock-up, text editor, or web browser.

integrity.description: Agent used the GUI to install or verify the style.
integrity.visual_evidence: The installation or verification is done via the Juris-M GUI (Preferences window or install prompt), rather than just copying files in the terminal without opening Juris-M to check.

integrity.description: Agent installed the correct style, not a generic one.
integrity.visual_evidence: The installed style is exactly 'Firm Standard 2025', not a default Zotero style or a manually typed text entry.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The custom CSL file is located at '/home/ga/Documents/firm-standard-2025.csl'. The style title that must appear in the Juris-M Style Manager is exactly 'Firm Standard 2025'. The style ID is 'http://www.zotero.org/styles/firm-standard-2025'.
